personal.name: Chris Heher
personal.title: Copyriter | Content Marketer | Conversational Designer
personal.bio: Crafting strategic content that turns complex technical concepts into compelling narratives that drive pipeline.

unique_strengths: Transforms technical jargon into compelling narratives
Deep experience in developer tools and enterprise SaaS
Bridges gap between technical teams and business stakeholders
Strong understanding of AI/ML, cybersecurity, and DevOps concepts
Builds scalable content systems and production workflows

content_systems_expertise.overview: Proven track record of building content production systems, editorial workflows, and governance frameworks that scale content operations while maintaining quality and consistency across distributed teams.

systems_built.system: Content production workflow and editorial calendar
systems_built.description: Built end-to-end content workflow integrating product launches with editorial calendar, enabling cross-functional alignment between engineering, product, and marketing teams
impact: Reduced content production time from 3-4 weeks to 1-2 weeks
Enabled 25+ blog series posts with consistent quality and voice
Created reusable content templates reducing start-from-scratch time by 40%
Established review process with engineering SMEs ensuring technical accuracy
tools_processes: installed editorial workflow for technical reviews, including creative briefs and zero drafts
Notion-based content calendar with intake forms

systems_built.description: Developed repeatable content framework connecting product releases to sales collateral, ensuring sales team had up-to-date materials aligned with product roadmap
impact: Created modular content library enabling sales to self-serve 70% of content needs
Reduced sales content request turnaround from 2 weeks to 3 days
Established quarterly content planning tied to product releases
Built content attribution model showing $10M+ pipeline influence
tools_processes: Salesforce tagging for content attribution tracking
Quarterly content roadmap aligned with product releases

systems_built.description: Established content governance framework for career site ensuring brand consistency while empowering recruiting teams to move quickly
impact: Created modular content system supporting 50+ job families
Reduced legal/compliance review time from 1 week to 2 days via pre-approved templates
Enabled recruiting teams to publish new content without writer bottleneck
Maintained brand voice consistency across 200+ pages
tools_processes: Content component library with approved modules
Greenhouse integration for job description templates
Brand voice guidelines with examples and anti-examples

systems_built.description: Built scalable workflow for producing interactive financial content at 3x velocity while maintaining design quality and compliance standards
impact: Increased content output from 4 pieces/month to 12 pieces/month
Reduced design-to-publish time from 3 weeks to 1 week
Created reusable design system for financial services clients
Enabled non-designers to produce compliant content
tools_processes: Component-based design system in Ceros platform
Legal pre-approval process for common claims/disclosures
Quality checklist automation reducing review cycles

core_competencies: Editorial calendar management and content planning
Cross-functional workflow design (engineering, product, sales, legal)
Content governance and brand consistency at scale
Style guide development and voice/tone documentation

projects.title: Cincoro Tequila | brand launch
projects.description: Celebrity tequila brand launch - social media strategy and brand voice for Michael Jordan's tequila company
projects.campaignListDescription: George Clooney. The Rock. Kendall Jenner. Bryan Cranston. Celebrity tequila is a crowded space. So when Michael Jordan and four other NBA owners started their own tequila company, I was there to help them find a way to help their brand stand out among the stars. Cincoro translates to 'five rings'. And so the story of Cincoro Tequila is the passion and competitive spirit its five owners share as they each chase their next championship ring.
impact: Created content processes and calendar delivering 2-3x higher engagement rates due to consistent posting schedules
Built social audience to 110K+ followers across platforms, exceeding brands with decades of history (Don Julio had ~97K Instagram in 2021)
brand grew from zero to 1.5M bottles sold

projects.title: Sentry Performance GTM campaign
projects.campaignListDescription: Product releases run the risk of getting bogged down in their own technical benefits. For Sentry's Performance monitoring release, this meant turning jargony features (such as improved visibility into p95 response times) into a simple, differentiating insight -- See Slow Faster
impact: $1.8M in attributed sales pipeline
~1.2k content sourced leads
Campaign content generated ~3.5k visits (2.3x site average)
$1b unicorn valuation achieved months after Performance product launch

projects.title: DroneDeploy Safety AI
projects.campaignListDescription: Worksite injuries cost the construction industry $5 billion annually. DroneDeploy's Safety AI uses computer vision to identify safety violations in real-time, turning reactive incident reports into proactive prevention.
impact: $450k per quarter in attribute content influence (~10% of total pipeline)
~140k views across content assets
20% click to open rate for email campaigns
~3k total landing page visits across top-of-funnel content

projects.title: Sentry Dogfooding Chronicles
projects.campaignListDescription: Dogfooding is the process in which a company uses its own product as a quality control mechanism. This concept was a perfect fit for Sentry to showcase how its software engineers were using Sentry's own platform to track errors in the codebase. Creating stories out of these mundane coding hiccups established Sentry as a thought leader across key industry blogs without sounding preachy or pedantic.
impact: Long-tail keyword dominance:--$50K-$150K/year in paid search ads
Organic traffic: $75K-$200K (replacement cost of paid search)
25+ blog posts generated a total of ~45k site visits -- 40% of which were organic

links.name: Using Sentry Performance to get Sentry Performant

projects.title: HP Presence
projects.campaignListDescription: The pandemic altered the fabric of society. And nowhere was this more evident than in the office. As HP's content strategist, I helped position their Presence videoconferencing suite to be the connective tissue for distributed workforces.
impact: 200k downloads/views during fiscal launch year
10x content ROI compared to traditional b2b benchmarks
$680K in closed-won deals attributed to white paper content (~8% of total pipeline)

links.name: The new office for the way people want to work
A new blueprint for an uncertain world
Get ready today to do tomorrow's work

projects.title: DroneDeploy Ground Robotics
projects.campaignListDescription: Working in partnership with Boston Dynamics, DroneDeploy's industrial inspection platform captures frequent and consistent data on assets that need regular monitoring in ways which scale up site visibility while dialing down man hours.
impact: 8.5% deals influenced in pipeline

projects.title: Airbnb Career website
projects.campaignListDescription: As lead writer for Airbnb's career website, I developed their employer value proposition coming out of their Live and Work Anywhere policy, then executed on that strategy with compelling content.
impact: 72% increase in applications first post-launch quarter
170% increase in applications from underrepresented groups
3.4x increase in page views vs. previous site

projects.title: Google GPay instrumentation
projects.campaignListDescription: Google's GPay API was designed to be simple. Which meant the content for its tutorial video needed to act likewise. So instead of a smug, stemwinding video that wastes a developer's time with phony rapport, I articulated the simplest path to instrumentation.
impact: 35k views during i/o launch event
1.5m ARR impact
~500 new integrations from live merchants

projects.title: Sentry developer content
projects.campaignListDescription: Sentry is an application monitoring platform that tracks various metrics and logs to optimize code health. My role involved creating developer-focused content that simplified complex technical concepts, making them accessible and engaging for a broad audience of software engineers.
impact: ARR: $45M → $90M during my tenure (Series B→C growth)
~480 SQL conversions (9.5% attributed to ARR)
~150k page visits in total

projects.title: DroneDeploy Product Pages
projects.campaignListDescription: Collaborating with product and sales teams, I piqued curiosity, ensured technical accuracy, and optimized each page by adding cross-links to related solutions and guides for mid- and bottom-funnel engagement.
impact: $2.5m content share for ground robotics
1.7% engagement rate to take meaningful action
28% increase in handraisers

projects.title: Sentry Product Pages
projects.campaignListDescription: Partnered with software engineers to co-produce content that articulated value propositions while moving users into trial.
impact: Internal product release alignment boosted CTR by 15–20% around launch week
Over 1.1k opportunities captured by form signups
15% adoption lift YoY
